subject: RFL-C3000S power output dropping after 2 hours
description: Our RFL-C3000S laser starts at full 3000W but drops to ~2400W after approximately 2 hours of continuous cutting. Coolant temperature appears normal. We've cleaned the output lens and QBH connector but issue persists.

messages.text: The power drop happens consistently after about 2 hours. We're cutting 10mm mild steel. Coolant temp stays at 22°C.

Thank you for the detailed report. This pattern suggests possible thermal lensing in the output optics or a degrading pump diode. Please check:
1. Water flow rate to the output head specifically (should be > 4 L/min)
2. Ambient temperature in the laser room
3. Any condensation on optical surfaces

We'll schedule a site visit if these checks don't resolve it.
Water flow rate was only 2.8 L/min to the output head — we found a partial blockage in the cooling line. Flushing now. Will report back.

subject: E-BR alarm during aluminum cutting
description: Getting frequent E-BR (back-reflection) alarms when cutting 3mm aluminum sheet on our RFL-C6000S. The laser shuts down and requires manual restart. This started happening after we switched from steel to aluminum jobs.

messages.text: We're using nitrogen assist gas at 12 bar. Cutting speed is 15m/min. The alarm triggers randomly during piercing. Production is severely affected.
